center.name: Madeirinha River
center.summary: Madeirinha River是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Chico's tyrannulet，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in southeastern Amazonas state from east of the Madeira River to the Aripuanã and Madeirinha rivers

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in southeastern Amazonas state from east of the Madeira River to the Aripuanã and Madeirinha rivers
